title: elymus jufinshanicus
intro: Elymus jufinshanicus, also known as Jufen grass or Jufen wild grass, is a type of plant native to China, belonging to the family Poaceae. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, with studies indicating that it has anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. Elymus jufinshanicus has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory problems, offering potential health benefits such as reduced inflammation and improved immune function. In traditional Chinese medicine, the plant is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, which are used to treat various ailments.
